competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Attempt saved. Donyell Malen (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Cody Gakpo.

events.description: 唐耶尔·马伦射正。 加克波参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Zion Suzuki.
Foul by Micky van de Ven (Netherlands).
Foul by Frenkie de Jong (Netherlands).
Corner, Japan. Conceded by Denzel Dumfries.
Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Hiroki Ito (Japan) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Keito Nakamura.

events.description: 伊藤洋辉射门偏出。 中村敬斗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match (Netherlands).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Shogo Taniguchi.
Attempt saved. Donyell Malen (Netherlands) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Tijjani Reijnders with a cross.

events.description: 唐耶尔·马伦射正。 蒂贾尼·雷恩德斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Micky van de Ven (Netherlands) header from the right side of the box is too high. Assisted by Tijjani Reijnders with a cross following a corner.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Micky van de Ven Shot Off Target

events.description: 米奇·范德文射门偏出。 蒂贾尼·雷恩德斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Keito Nakamura (Japan).
Attempt missed. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Denzel Dumfries following a set piece situation.

events.description: 加克波射门偏出。 邓弗里斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Keito Nakamura (Japan) right footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Tsuyoshi Watanabe with a cross.

events.description: 中村敬斗射门偏出。 渡边刚志参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Takefusa Kubo (Japan) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Frenkie de Jong (Netherlands).
Attempt missed. Ayase Ueda (Japan) right footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Daichi Kamada with a through ball.

events.description: 上田绮世射门偏出。 镰田大地参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Hiroki Ito (Japan).
Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Keito Nakamura.
Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时3分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Netherlands 0, Japan 0.
Second Half begins Netherlands 0, Japan 0.

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 范戴克 进球，赫拉芬贝赫 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ritsu Doan (Japan).

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 中村敬斗 进球，久保建英 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Ayase Ueda.

events.description: 克里森西奥·萨默维尔 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands).

events.description: 克里森西奥·萨默维尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Takefusa Kubo (Japan).

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 克里森西奥·萨默维尔 进球，赫拉芬贝赫 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ayase Ueda (Japan).

events.description: 伊东纯也 登场，前田大善 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Netherlands. Cody Gakpo is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Takefusa Kubo (Japan) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Ayase Ueda.

events.description: 久保建英射门偏出。 上田绮世参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 德佩 登场，唐耶尔·马伦 离场
昆顿木业 登场，蒂贾尼·雷恩德斯 离场
特恩·库普迈纳斯 登场，克里森西奥·萨默维尔 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Takefusa Kubo (Japan).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Frenkie de Jong.

events.description: 加克波射正。 德容参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Zion Suzuki.
Attempt saved. Jan Paul van Hecke (Netherlands) header from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the top right corner by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Memphis Depay with a cross.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Jan Paul van Hecke Shot On Targe

events.description: 扬·保罗·范赫克射正。 德佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Japan. Conceded by Micky van de Ven.

events.description: 富安健洋 登场，渡边刚志 离场
小川幸之助 登场，久保建英 离场
菅原由势 登场，杜安律 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Keito Nakamura (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Junya Ito with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 中村敬斗射门偏出。 伊东纯也参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Teun Koopmeiners (Netherlands) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Quinten Timber.

events.description: 特恩·库普迈纳斯射门被封堵。 昆顿木业参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Koki Ogawa (Japan) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Yukinari Sugawara with a cross.

events.description: 小川幸之助射门偏出。 菅原由势参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Yukinari Sugawara (Japan) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Junya Ito.

events.description: 菅原由势射正。 伊东纯也参与进攻。
内森·阿克 登场，赫拉芬贝赫 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Memphis Depay (Netherlands).

events.description: 布罗贝 登场，加克波 离场
盐贝贤人 登场，上田绮世 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Frenkie de Jong (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Teun Koopmeiners (Netherlands).
Corner, Japan. Conceded by Micky van de Ven.

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 镰田大地 进球，小川幸之助 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Japan. Conceded by Denzel Dumfries.
Attempt blocked. Koki Ogawa (Japan) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Junya Ito with a cross.

events.description: 小川幸之助射门被封堵。 伊东纯也参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match (Netherlands).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Junya Ito (Japan) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt missed. Teun Koopmeiners (Netherlands) header from the left side of the six yard box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Denzel Dumfries with a cross.

events.description: 特恩·库普迈纳斯射门偏出。 邓弗里斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。
